title: Switzerland (Canton Zürich) Professional Expense Deductions Schedule (Berufsauslagen 2025)
description: The Canton of Zürich's companion schedule to the personal income and wealth tax return for natural persons (ch/zh/sta/steuererklaerung-natuerliche-personen), used by an employed taxpayer (Unselbständigerwerbende) to compute the deductible professional/work-related expenses (Berufsauslagen) referenced by the main return's own Ziffer 11.1 (Person 1) and Ziffer 11.2 (Person 2). The 2-page source form mirrors the same seven-section layout once per person (page 1 for Person 1, page 2 for Person 2, each independently completed and transferred to the main return): commuting costs between home and workplace (public-transit subscription, a flat-rate bicycle/moped allowance, and a private-car/motorcycle worksheet, subtotalled and capped), extra meal costs for away-from-home working or shift/night work, other costs required to carry out the occupation (a flat-rate or itemized-actual choice), extra costs for an out-of-town weekly residence, side-job expenses (flat-rate or itemized-actual), the resulting total professional-expense deduction, and the four alternative statutory justifications for deducting private-vehicle commuting costs instead of public-transit fare. This document models: the household/employment header (AHVN13, municipality, name, employer, workplace address) for each person; every numbered state-tax/federal-tax amount pair a filer enters directly (the private-vehicle commuting sub-table collapsed into one free-text field per this registry's established treatment of unbounded repeating tables, GSP-0009); the private-vehicle-use justification checkboxes; and the final per-person, per-tax-column total that transfers onto the main return. It does NOT model: the underlying Lohnausweis (salary certificate) net-wage figure the 3%-of-net-wage flat rate is computed from (a value belonging to the main return / employer's own certificate, not this schedule); the free-form itemized statement (Aufstellung) a filer attaches when claiming actual costs above a flat rate, represented only as a gated `documents[]` requirement; or any office-only field. It does not submit the return; the live source (zh.ch / the ZHprivateTax online filing portal) is always authoritative. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Switzerland, the Canton of Zürich, or its Kantonales Steueramt.

authority.name: Kanton Zürich — Finanzdirektion, Kantonales Steueramt Zürich

source.documentRef: StA Form. 360 (2024) 12.25 — Berufsauslagen 2025, Kanton Zürich (2-page schedule: Person 1 on p.1, Person 2 on p.2), read together with the main return it is a companion to, ch/zh/sta/steuererklaerung-natuerliche-personen, whose own lines 220/240 (Ziffer 11.1/11.2) reference this document by name, and with the Kantonales Steueramt Zürich's own 40-page 'Wegleitung zur Steuererklärung 2025' at https://www.zh.ch/content/dam/zhweb/bilder-dokumente/themen/steuern-finanzen/steuern/natuerlichepersonen/2025/est-wegleitungen/305_Wegleitung_ZH_2025_HA%20bf%20DEF.pdf, whose pp.13-14 restate every rate/cap printed on this form and whose p.36 carries an official worked specimen of this exact form.

verification.notes: GOV-1868: GovSchema Standard Research cycle. Closes the specific open backlog candidate CATALOG.md flagged after GOV-1854 (which authored the Wertschriftenverzeichnis and left the remaining six CH-ZH companion schedules as an open list), picking Berufsauslagen as the strongest remaining candidate since work-related expense deductions are claimed by nearly every salaried filer, unlike the securities schedule which only applies to investors. The form (360 Berufsauslagen ZH 2025 HA DEF.pdf, 71,793 bytes, 2 pages, %PDF-1.4, no /Encrypt) was fetched fresh this cycle directly from the same zh.ch tax-forms listing page GOV-1847/GOV-1854 used (HTTP 200, no login/CAPTCHA/WAF gate). pdfjs-dist text extraction (with full (x, y) coordinates) plus a pdf-lib AcroForm scan (`form.getFields()`) and a pdfjs-dist per-page Widget-annotation scan (`page.getAnnotations()`) both confirm zero fillable form fields across both pages — the same flat, non-AcroForm, print/reference-facsimile shape as its two CH-ZH sibling schemas. Unlike the main return, every statutory rate and cap this form's own lines depend on (CHF 700 flat bicycle/moped rate; CHF 5'200/CHF 3'300 commuting-cost caps; CHF 7.50/day-CHF 1'600/year and CHF 15/day-CHF 3'200/year meal-surcharge rates and caps; CHF 0.70/CHF 0.40 per-km car/motorcycle rates; the 3%-of-net-wage CHF 2'000-CHF 4'000 other-costs band; the 20%-of-side-income CHF 800-CHF 2'400 side-job band) is printed directly on the form's own two pages, so no separate Wegleitung lookup was required to fill in a missing figure — the Wegleitung (fetched the same way, HTTP 200, 1,497,565 bytes, 40 pages) was instead used only to (a) confirm no additional statutory cap exists for the one line the form itself defers entirely to the Wegleitung (line 2860/2861, extra costs for an out-of-town weekly residence, per pp.13-14: a composite of an uncapped actual-rent lodging component, a CHF 15/day-CHF 3'200/year meal component, and an already-counted-elsewhere home-trip component, confirming this line is correctly left as a plain filer-entered amount rather than a fixed cap), (b) confirm the exact statutory wording of the four private-vehicle-use justifications (pp.13, matching the form's own checkboxes 2041-2044 verbatim), and (c) cross-check this schema's own worked mock-data example against the Wegleitung's own official specimen of this exact form (p.36, a fully filled Berufsauslagen 2025 for 'Muster-Meister Felix', Kanton Zürich, AHVN13 756.1234.5678.90: CHF 700 bicycle flat rate at line 202, CHF 1'600 capped meal surcharge at line 206, CHF 2'515 other-costs flat-rate deduction at line 212, all other lines blank, totalling CHF 4'815 at line 220 for both tax columns), rendered to PNG via node-canvas and visually confirmed to match this schema's field layout before any field name was assigned. See VERIFICATION.md for the full field-by-field source mapping, every disclosed scope decision, and a separately-authored (fabricated, not copied from the official specimen) worked mock-data example.

fields.name: ahvn13RemainingDigitsPerson1
fields.label: AHVN13 (13-stellig)
fields.description: The remaining 10 digits of Person 1's 13-digit Swiss social security number (AHVN13); the first three digits, 756 (Switzerland's fixed country prefix), are pre-printed in the form's own boxes. Printed only on Person 1's page; Person 2's own AHVN13 is not separately requested on this schedule.

fields.name: gemeinde
fields.label: Gemeinde
fields.description: The taxpayer's municipality of residence (Gemeinde) within Canton Zürich.

fields.name: namePerson1
fields.label: Name (Person 1)
fields.description: Person 1's surname.

fields.name: vornamePerson1
fields.label: Vorname (Person 1)
fields.description: Person 1's first name.

fields.name: arbeitgeberPerson1
fields.label: Arbeitgeber (Person 1)
fields.description: Name of Person 1's employer.

fields.name: arbeitsortStrassePerson1
fields.label: Arbeitsort / Strasse (Person 1)
fields.description: Person 1's place and street of work.

fields.name: namePerson2
fields.label: Name (Person 2)
fields.description: Person 2's surname, completed only when Person 2 also has deductible professional expenses (joint return).

fields.name: vornamePerson2
fields.label: Vorname (Person 2)
fields.description: Person 2's first name.

fields.name: arbeitgeberPerson2
fields.label: Arbeitgeber (Person 2)
fields.description: Name of Person 2's employer.

fields.name: arbeitsortStrassePerson2
fields.label: Arbeitsort / Strasse (Person 2)
fields.description: Person 2's place and street of work.

fields.name: publicTransitSubscriptionCostsPerson1StateTax
fields.label: 1.1 Abonnementkosten für öffentliche Verkehrsmittel — Staatssteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Person 1's necessary subscription costs for regular use of public transport (train, boat, tram, bus) between home and workplace, state-tax column.

fields.name: publicTransitSubscriptionCostsPerson1FederalTax
fields.label: 1.1 Abonnementkosten für öffentliche Verkehrsmittel — Bundessteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Same as publicTransitSubscriptionCostsPerson1StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: bicycleMopedFlatRatePerson1StateTax
fields.label: 1.2 Fahrrad, Kleinmotorrad pauschal CHF 700 — Staatssteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Flat-rate deduction of CHF 700 for Person 1's regular use of their own bicycle or small motorcycle with a yellow number plate (Kleinmotorrad), state-tax column.

fields.name: bicycleMopedFlatRatePerson1FederalTax
fields.label: 1.2 Fahrrad, Kleinmotorrad pauschal CHF 700 — Bundessteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Same as bicycleMopedFlatRatePerson1StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: carMotorcycleCommutingDetailsPerson1
fields.label: 1.3 Auto, Motorrad — Person 1
fields.description: Person 1's private-car/motorcycle commuting worksheet, completed only in the exceptional cases listed in reasonNoPublicTransportPerson1/reasonTimeSavingsOver1HourPerson1/reasonEmployerRequiredPerson1/reasonMedicalUnableToUsePublicTransportPerson1: for up to two workplaces, whether the vehicle is a car (CHF -.70/km) or motorcycle with a white plate (CHF -.40/km), whether it is leased (geleastes Fahrzeug), the workplace, number of working days, distance in km, number of trips per day, km per year, and the resulting deduction before rounding. Collapsed into one free-text field per the source table's own two repeating rows, consistent with this registry's established treatment of unbounded repeating tables under GovSchema v0.3's flat field model (GSP-0009). An employee with a company car available cannot claim any commuting-cost deduction under this section.

fields.name: carMotorcycleDeductionPerson1StateTax
fields.label: 1.3 Auto, Motorrad — Abzug CHF ohne Rappen — Staatssteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Total deduction computed from carMotorcycleCommutingDetailsPerson1 (both workplace rows combined), state-tax column.

fields.name: carMotorcycleDeductionPerson1FederalTax
fields.label: 1.3 Auto, Motorrad — Abzug CHF ohne Rappen — Bundessteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Same as carMotorcycleDeductionPerson1StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: commutingCostsSubtotalPerson1StateTax
fields.label: Zwischentotal — Staatssteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Subtotal of Person 1's commuting-cost lines (publicTransitSubscriptionCostsPerson1StateTax + bicycleMopedFlatRatePerson1StateTax + carMotorcycleDeductionPerson1StateTax), state-tax column, capped at CHF 5'200.

fields.name: commutingCostsSubtotalPerson1FederalTax
fields.label: Zwischentotal — Bundessteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Same as commutingCostsSubtotalPerson1StateTax, federal-tax column, capped at CHF 3'300.

fields.name: mealSurchargeEmployerSubsidizedPerson1StateTax
fields.label: 2.1 Mehrkosten Verpflegung, Arbeitgeber verbilligt — Staatssteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Extra meal costs for Person 1 when eating away from home because the work-break duration does not allow returning home, and the employer subsidizes meals (canteen, staff restaurant, cash contribution, meal vouchers) but the employee still incurs extra cost: CHF 7.50 per working day, capped at CHF 1'600/year for a filer who eats away from home on an ongoing basis, state-tax column.

fields.name: mealSurchargeEmployerSubsidizedPerson1FederalTax
fields.label: 2.1 Mehrkosten Verpflegung, Arbeitgeber verbilligt — Bundessteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Same as mealSurchargeEmployerSubsidizedPerson1StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: mealSurchargeFullyEmployeeBornePerson1StateTax
fields.label: 2.1 Mehrkosten Verpflegung, voll zu Lasten des Arbeitnehmers — Staatssteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Extra meal costs for Person 1 when the away-from-home meal is entirely at the employee's own expense: CHF 15 per working day, capped at CHF 3'200/year for ongoing away-from-home eating, state-tax column.

fields.name: mealSurchargeFullyEmployeeBornePerson1FederalTax
fields.label: 2.1 Mehrkosten Verpflegung, voll zu Lasten des Arbeitnehmers — Bundessteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Same as mealSurchargeFullyEmployeeBornePerson1StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: shiftNightWorkDaysPerson1
fields.label: 2.2 Schicht-/Nachtarbeit, Anzahl Tage (Person 1)
fields.description: Number of days Person 1 worked a continuous shift of at least eight hours, or night work, that qualifies for the shift/night-work meal surcharge (irregular/staggered working hours count as shift work if neither main meal can be taken at home at the usual time). Shared between both tax columns.

fields.name: shiftNightWorkCompensationPerson1StateTax
fields.label: 2.2 Schicht-/Nachtarbeit — Staatssteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Shift/night-work meal surcharge for Person 1: CHF 15 per qualifying day (shiftNightWorkDaysPerson1), capped at CHF 3'200/year for ongoing shift/night work. These deductions may not be combined with mealSurchargeEmployerSubsidizedPerson1StateTax/mealSurchargeFullyEmployeeBornePerson1StateTax for the same days, state-tax column.

fields.name: shiftNightWorkCompensationPerson1FederalTax
fields.label: 2.2 Schicht-/Nachtarbeit — Bundessteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Same as shiftNightWorkCompensationPerson1StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: otherProfessionalCostsFlatRatePerson1StateTax
fields.label: 3. Übrige Berufskosten, pauschal — Staatssteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Flat-rate deduction for other costs required to carry out Person 1's occupation (work clothing, tools including IT hardware/software, professional literature, a private home office, professional-association dues): 3% of net wage per the salary certificate (Lohnausweis), minimum CHF 2'000, maximum CHF 4'000, state-tax column. Net wage is gross wage less AHV/IV/EO and ALV contributions, ongoing occupational-pension contributions (including those from pay rises), and mandatory non-occupational-accident-insurance premiums.

fields.name: otherProfessionalCostsFlatRatePerson1FederalTax
fields.label: 3. Übrige Berufskosten, pauschal — Bundessteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Same as otherProfessionalCostsFlatRatePerson1StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: otherProfessionalCostsActualPerson1StateTax
fields.label: 3. Übrige Berufskosten, bzw. effektiv gemäss Aufstellung — Staatssteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Actual other professional costs claimed instead of otherProfessionalCostsFlatRatePerson1StateTax, when they exceed the flat rate, per an itemized statement (Aufstellung) filed with the return, state-tax column.

fields.name: otherProfessionalCostsActualPerson1FederalTax
fields.label: 3. Übrige Berufskosten, bzw. effektiv gemäss Aufstellung — Bundessteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Same as otherProfessionalCostsActualPerson1StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: weeklyResidenceExtraCostsPerson1StateTax
fields.label: 4. Mehrkosten bei auswärtigem Wochenaufenthalt — Staatssteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Extra costs for Person 1's out-of-town weekly residence (auswärtiger Wochenaufenthalt), per an itemized statement (Aufstellung, see Wegleitung): the necessary extra cost of away-from-home dinner (CHF 15/working day, or CHF 3'200/year for a full-year weekly residence), the actual rent for a room at the place of work, and the cost of the weekly trip home (ordinarily only public-transport costs, already claimed under Ziffer 1 of this schedule rather than here). No separate statutory cap is printed for this line's combined total; state-tax column.

fields.name: weeklyResidenceExtraCostsPerson1FederalTax
fields.label: 4. Mehrkosten bei auswärtigem Wochenaufenthalt — Bundessteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Same as weeklyResidenceExtraCostsPerson1StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: sideJobExpensesFlatRatePerson1StateTax
fields.label: 5. Auslagen bei Nebenerwerb, pauschal — Staatssteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Flat-rate deduction for all expenses (including commuting and away-from-home meals) related to Person 1's employed side job(s): 20% of side-job income, minimum CHF 800, maximum CHF 2'400 in total, state-tax column.

fields.name: sideJobExpensesFlatRatePerson1FederalTax
fields.label: 5. Auslagen bei Nebenerwerb, pauschal — Bundessteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Same as sideJobExpensesFlatRatePerson1StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: sideJobExpensesActualPerson1StateTax
fields.label: 5. Auslagen bei Nebenerwerb, bzw. effektiv gemäss Aufstellung — Staatssteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Actual side-job expenses claimed instead of sideJobExpensesFlatRatePerson1StateTax, when they exceed the flat rate, detailed in and provable on request via an itemized statement (Aufstellung), state-tax column.

fields.name: sideJobExpensesActualPerson1FederalTax
fields.label: 5. Auslagen bei Nebenerwerb, bzw. effektiv gemäss Aufstellung — Bundessteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Same as sideJobExpensesActualPerson1StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: totalProfessionalExpensesPerson1StateTax
fields.label: 6. Total der Berufsauslagen — Staatssteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Person 1's total deductible professional expenses, state-tax column. Transfers to the main return's professionalExpensesPerson1StateTax field (Steuererklärung Seite 3, Ziffer 11.1).

fields.name: totalProfessionalExpensesPerson1FederalTax
fields.label: 6. Total der Berufsauslagen — Bundessteuer (Person 1)
fields.description: Person 1's total deductible professional expenses, federal-tax column. Transfers to the main return's professionalExpensesPerson1FederalTax field (Steuererklärung Seite 3, Ziffer 11.1).

fields.name: reasonNoPublicTransportPerson1
fields.label: 7. Fehlen eines öffentlichen Verkehrsmittels (Person 1)
fields.description: Whether Person 1 claims private-vehicle commuting costs because no public transport is available: the home or workplace is at least 1 km from the nearest stop, or no public transport runs at the start/end of the work day.

fields.name: reasonTimeSavingsOver1HourPerson1
fields.label: 7. Zeitersparnis von über 1 Stunde bei Benützung des privaten Motorfahrzeuges (Person 1)
fields.description: Whether Person 1 claims private-vehicle commuting costs because using the private vehicle (door-to-door, round trip) saves more than one hour compared with public transport.

fields.name: reasonEmployerRequiredPerson1
fields.label: 7. Ständige Benützung während der Arbeitszeit auf Verlangen und gegen Entschädigung des Arbeitgebers (Person 1)
fields.description: Whether Person 1 claims private-vehicle commuting costs because the employer requires ongoing use of the private vehicle during working hours and compensates for it, while paying no allowance for the home-workplace commute itself. A written confirmation from the employer must be filed with the return.

fields.name: reasonMedicalUnableToUsePublicTransportPerson1
fields.label: 7. Unmöglichkeit der Benützung des öffentl. Verkehrsmittels zufolge Krankheit / Gebrechlichkeit (Person 1)
fields.description: Whether Person 1 claims private-vehicle commuting costs because illness or infirmity makes using public transport impossible. A doctor's certificate (Arztzeugnis) must be filed with the return.

fields.name: publicTransitSubscriptionCostsPerson2StateTax
fields.label: 1.1 Abonnementkosten für öffentliche Verkehrsmittel — Staatssteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Person 2's necessary subscription costs for regular use of public transport between home and workplace, state-tax column.

fields.name: publicTransitSubscriptionCostsPerson2FederalTax
fields.label: 1.1 Abonnementkosten für öffentliche Verkehrsmittel — Bundessteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Same as publicTransitSubscriptionCostsPerson2StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: bicycleMopedFlatRatePerson2StateTax
fields.label: 1.2 Fahrrad, Kleinmotorrad pauschal CHF 700 — Staatssteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Flat-rate deduction of CHF 700 for Person 2's regular use of their own bicycle or small motorcycle with a yellow number plate, state-tax column.

fields.name: bicycleMopedFlatRatePerson2FederalTax
fields.label: 1.2 Fahrrad, Kleinmotorrad pauschal CHF 700 — Bundessteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Same as bicycleMopedFlatRatePerson2StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: carMotorcycleCommutingDetailsPerson2
fields.label: 1.3 Auto, Motorrad — Person 2
fields.description: Same as carMotorcycleCommutingDetailsPerson1, for Person 2.

fields.name: carMotorcycleDeductionPerson2StateTax
fields.label: 1.3 Auto, Motorrad — Abzug CHF ohne Rappen — Staatssteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Total deduction computed from carMotorcycleCommutingDetailsPerson2 (both workplace rows combined), state-tax column.

fields.name: carMotorcycleDeductionPerson2FederalTax
fields.label: 1.3 Auto, Motorrad — Abzug CHF ohne Rappen — Bundessteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Same as carMotorcycleDeductionPerson2StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: commutingCostsSubtotalPerson2StateTax
fields.label: Zwischentotal — Staatssteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Subtotal of Person 2's commuting-cost lines (publicTransitSubscriptionCostsPerson2StateTax + bicycleMopedFlatRatePerson2StateTax + carMotorcycleDeductionPerson2StateTax), state-tax column, capped at CHF 5'200.

fields.name: commutingCostsSubtotalPerson2FederalTax
fields.label: Zwischentotal — Bundessteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Same as commutingCostsSubtotalPerson2StateTax, federal-tax column, capped at CHF 3'300.

fields.name: mealSurchargeEmployerSubsidizedPerson2StateTax
fields.label: 2.1 Mehrkosten Verpflegung, Arbeitgeber verbilligt — Staatssteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Same as mealSurchargeEmployerSubsidizedPerson1StateTax, for Person 2, state-tax column.

fields.name: mealSurchargeEmployerSubsidizedPerson2FederalTax
fields.label: 2.1 Mehrkosten Verpflegung, Arbeitgeber verbilligt — Bundessteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Same as mealSurchargeEmployerSubsidizedPerson2StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: mealSurchargeFullyEmployeeBornePerson2StateTax
fields.label: 2.1 Mehrkosten Verpflegung, voll zu Lasten des Arbeitnehmers — Staatssteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Same as mealSurchargeFullyEmployeeBornePerson1StateTax, for Person 2, state-tax column.

fields.name: mealSurchargeFullyEmployeeBornePerson2FederalTax
fields.label: 2.1 Mehrkosten Verpflegung, voll zu Lasten des Arbeitnehmers — Bundessteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Same as mealSurchargeFullyEmployeeBornePerson2StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: shiftNightWorkDaysPerson2
fields.label: 2.2 Schicht-/Nachtarbeit, Anzahl Tage (Person 2)
fields.description: Same as shiftNightWorkDaysPerson1, for Person 2.

fields.name: shiftNightWorkCompensationPerson2StateTax
fields.label: 2.2 Schicht-/Nachtarbeit — Staatssteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Same as shiftNightWorkCompensationPerson1StateTax, for Person 2, state-tax column.

fields.name: shiftNightWorkCompensationPerson2FederalTax
fields.label: 2.2 Schicht-/Nachtarbeit — Bundessteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Same as shiftNightWorkCompensationPerson2StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: otherProfessionalCostsFlatRatePerson2StateTax
fields.label: 3. Übrige Berufskosten, pauschal — Staatssteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Same as otherProfessionalCostsFlatRatePerson1StateTax, for Person 2, state-tax column.

fields.name: otherProfessionalCostsFlatRatePerson2FederalTax
fields.label: 3. Übrige Berufskosten, pauschal — Bundessteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Same as otherProfessionalCostsFlatRatePerson2StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: otherProfessionalCostsActualPerson2StateTax
fields.label: 3. Übrige Berufskosten, bzw. effektiv gemäss Aufstellung — Staatssteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Same as otherProfessionalCostsActualPerson1StateTax, for Person 2, state-tax column.

fields.name: otherProfessionalCostsActualPerson2FederalTax
fields.label: 3. Übrige Berufskosten, bzw. effektiv gemäss Aufstellung — Bundessteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Same as otherProfessionalCostsActualPerson2StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: weeklyResidenceExtraCostsPerson2StateTax
fields.label: 4. Mehrkosten bei auswärtigem Wochenaufenthalt — Staatssteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Same as weeklyResidenceExtraCostsPerson1StateTax, for Person 2, state-tax column.

fields.label: 4. Mehrkosten bei auswärtigem Wochenaufenthalt — Bundessteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Same as weeklyResidenceExtraCostsPerson2StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: sideJobExpensesFlatRatePerson2StateTax
fields.label: 5. Auslagen bei Nebenerwerb, pauschal — Staatssteuer (Person 2)
fields.description: Same as sideJobExpensesFlatRatePerson1StateTax, for Person 2, state-tax column.

fields.description: Same as sideJobExpensesFlatRatePerson2StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: sideJobExpensesActualPerson2FederalTax

fields.description: Same as sideJobExpensesActualPerson2StateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.description: Person 2's total deductible professional expenses, state-tax column. Transfers to the main return's professionalExpensesPerson2StateTax field (Steuererklärung Seite 3, Ziffer 11.2).

fields.description: Same as reasonMedicalUnableToUsePublicTransportPerson1, for Person 2. A doctor's certificate (Arztzeugnis) must be filed with the return.

documents.label: Aufstellung über die tatsächlichen Berufsauslagen bzw. Auslagen bei Nebenerwerb
Aufstellung über die Mehrkosten bei auswärtigem Wochenaufenthalt (siehe Wegleitung)
Bestätigung des Arbeitgebers über ständige Benützung des privaten Motorfahrzeuges
Arztzeugnis über die Unmöglichkeit der Benützung öffentlicher Verkehrsmittel

steps.title: 2.-5. Mehrkosten, übrige Berufskosten und Auslagen bei Nebenerwerb (Person 1)
2.-5. Mehrkosten, übrige Berufskosten und Auslagen bei Nebenerwerb (Person 2)
